original_prompt: Modernize Leaflet maps with CartoDB Voyager tiles and integrate leaflet-control-geocoder for search functionality across Van management, Appointment Booking, and Appointment Details views.
rephrased_goal: Implement searchable, high-fidelity maps by adding geocoder dependencies, styling them for consistency, and updating map initialization logic in key view modules.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Add geocoder dependencies to index.html
tasks.analogy_reference: carrying new shiny rocks to cave entrance

subtasks_required: 2.1 Read index.html lines 20-40 and end of body
tasks.testing_criteria: Links match the requested unpkg URLs.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Add consistency styles to src/styles/main.css
tasks.analogy_reference: painting the geocoder rock with tribe colors

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.vans.js with Voyager tiles and search
tasks.testing_criteria: L.tileLayer uses cartocdn URL; L.Control.geocoder is added.

subtasks_required: 6.1 Gherkin search for Voyager URL in view.vans.js
tasks.testing_criteria: Cartocdn URL present twice in file.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.appointments.js with Voyager and auto-click search
subtasks_required: 7.2 Implement markgeocode event to fire click on map center

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.appointment_detail.js with Voyager tiles
tasks.testing_criteria: Cartocdn URL replaces openstreetmap URL in detail view.

subtasks_required: Review all files for dead Leaflet code
tasks.testing_criteria: Application builds; all maps modern; search works.
